subcodes.first_line: Your letter hath appeared before Our face, and its essence was apportioned from the burning of the inmost heart. Who am I [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر تلقاء الوجه کتابک و هذا صدره آنکه از حرق الحشا مقسوم گشته کیست من ان
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @knowledge; recognition of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation
